Power Automate.feature_name: View property value expanded inline in new cloud flow designer
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: You can be more efficient when authoring or debugging flows by using the inline view to examine property values from multiple steps at once without needing to select each step separately.

Power Automate.feature_name: Analyze processes using object-centric process mining
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: Object-centric process mining delivers transformative insights that traditional process analysis simply can't capture. By analyzing how multiple object types, such as orders, items, deliveries, and invoices interact throughout your processes, you gain a complete, realistic view of your operations as they actually function. This comprehensive visibility enables you to identify hidden inefficiencies, such as bottlenecks that only appear when certain object combinations occur, or resource constrain

Power Automate.feature_name: Analyze your processes in the process intelligence experience
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: The process intelligence experience eliminates the friction between your questions and your answers. Instead of navigating rigid dashboards or using a desktop application, your teams work in a fluid, customizable environment that adapts to their analysis needs in real-time. This means faster time-to-insight, reduced training overhead, and the ability to tackle complex process questions without constantly restarting your analysis. Business analysts, process owners, and improvement teams can now b

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Monitor data management framework with Azure Monitor Application Insights
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Finance and operations cross application integration
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Microsoft Dataverse.description: Data management framework telemetry gives customers real‑time visibility into data import and export jobs. It provides progress tracking, detailed error insights, and proactive alerts through Azure Application Insights, helping teams troubleshoot faster, reduce operational effort, and run data management more reliably.

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Enhance Dataverse record descriptions for Copilot /mention
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Improved enterprise experiences in Power Platform
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Microsoft Dataverse.description: Enables Microsoft 365 Copilot to surface business data with meaningful context, reducing confusion from generic labels and helping users quickly identify the right records to drive faster workflows and more reliable decision-making.

Microsoft Power Platform governance and.feature_name: Manage agent security with enhanced admin controls
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.product: Microsoft Power Platform governance and administration
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.description: By using new governance controls, you can guide Copilot and agent development in your tenants, enforce governance policies that match your organizational requirements, and unlock new innovation opportunities.
